data.body: PASS 1 / T11 (Data-migration & backfill safety): PASS. The "migration" is a lazy, per-ticket in-memory reseed in the reducer (seed managed_refs from current deps + parent_id on first reduce/restore where absent), not a schema DDL or bulk backfill transaction. It is idempotent (only seeds on absence; strictly monotonic thereafter), needs no batching (per-ticket cardinality is tens, applied on the normal reduce path), has an explicit back-out (disable the fold → gate degrades to a safe no-op, additive-only), and is forward-compatible (older clones preserve-and-ignore; fsck WARNs on newer state). No downtime/dual-write/rollback hazards apply to this event-sourced reseed.
